title: pectis stenophylla var. stenophylla
intro: Pectis stenophylla var. stenophylla, also known as Narrowleaf Pectis, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce oxidative stress. Narrowleaf Pectis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in salads or as a cooked green vegetable.
